title: Seed tests/ with loop.config validation test
description: st onboard flagged missing tests/. Add tests/test_loop_config.py that parses .loop/loop.config (shell-sourced KEY=value pairs) and asserts required keys (REPO_OWNER, REPO_NAME, DEFAULT_BRANCH, BRANCH_PREFIX, WORKTREE_BASE, TEST_CMD, severity labels). Gives CI a meaningful signal and catches config regressions.

title: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow (pre-commit + pytest)
description: st onboard flagged missing .github/workflows/. Add ci.yml that runs pre-commit hooks against all files and pytest -q (matching loop.config TEST_CMD) on push/PR so dev-agent PRs have a real merge signal.

title: Add .pre-commit-config.yaml with hygiene hooks
description: st onboard flagged missing .pre-commit-config.yaml. Add minimal language-agnostic hooks (trailing-whitespace, end-of-file-fixer, check-yaml, check-json, check-merge-conflict) so dev-agent commits are auto-formatted.
